easy.title: Accessibility Audit Report
easy.description: Take a provided HTML page (with intentional accessibility issues) and perform an accessibility audit. Identify all violations using WCAG 2.2 criteria, categorize them by principle (POUR), suggest fixes, and implement the corrections. Create a before/after comparison showing the improvements.
easy.starterCode:

easy.solution:
Skip to main content

Welcome

  • Home
  • About
Accessibility Issues Fixed: 1. Added lang attribute 2. Changed div.header to header with h1 3. Changed div.nav to nav with list and links 4. Changed span links to anchor tags 5. Added alt text to image 6. Added form labels 7. Changed div submit to button 8. Added focus styles 9. Added skip link 10. Changed div.main to main element

medium.title: Accessible Accordion Component
medium.description: Build a fully accessible accordion component from scratch. It must work with keyboard navigation, announce expanded/collapsed states to screen readers, manage focus correctly, and follow the WAI-ARIA Accordion pattern. Include proper heading hierarchy, ARIA attributes (aria-expanded, aria-controls, role), and visible focus indicators.

hard.title: Full Accessibility Overhaul of a Legacy Page
hard.description: You are given a legacy web page with severe accessibility issues. Perform a complete accessibility overhaul: fix all WCAG A and AA violations, implement a proper heading hierarchy, add skip links, fix color contrast, make all interactive elements keyboard accessible, add ARIA landmarks, implement proper form labels and error handling, add focus management for dynamic content, and ensure screen reader compatibility. Document all changes with WCAG criteria references.
hard.starterCode:
Welcome to our store! Cart (3)
Home Products Contact
Featured Products
Product 1 - $29.99
Search: Go
© 2024 Store. All rights reserved.
hard.solution:
Complete overhaul implementing:

1. HTML Structure: Added lang, viewport, charset, proper doctype
2. Skip link: Visible on focus, links to main
3. Landmarks: header, nav, main, footer with proper ARIA roles
4. Navigation: Converted spans to <a> in <ul>/<li>
5. Images: Added descriptive alt text
6. Color contrast: WCAG AA compliant colors (4.5:1+)
7. Form: Added <label> for search input, proper submit button
8. Keyboard: All elements keyboard accessible with focus indicators
9. ARIA: aria-current for active page, aria-label for nav, aria-live for cart
10. Heading hierarchy: h1 for page title, h2 for sections, h3 for products
11. Font: Minimum 16px body text, proper sizing
12. Footer: Proper contrast for copyright text
13. Interactive: Product cards are focusable buttons with proper roles
14. Error handling: Form validation with accessible error messages
15. Cart: aria-live region for cart count updates
